The vibrant crimson red hue lends a rich and festive look, while the lightweight net fabric creates a soft, flowing silhouette. Finished with exquisite handwork detailing, this ensemble is perfect for weddings, receptions, and special occasions.

The sharara is enhanced with intricate decorative border detailing and printed patterns, creating a graceful blend of traditional aesthetics and contemporary elegance. Perfect for festive gatherings, celebrations, and special occasions.

products.title: Champagne Embroidered Sharara Set

The ensemble features a delicately embroidered sleeveless kurta adorned with intricate tonal zari, thread, and sequin embroidery arranged in graceful vertical motifs. The scalloped neckline and hemline add a refined touch, enhancing the silhouette with timeless sophistication.

Paired with a flowing sharara, the set showcases coordinated embroidery throughout, creating a harmonious and elongated look. Completing the outfit is a lightweight net dupatta, adding an ethereal layer that perfectly complements the soft sheen of the fabric.

products.title: Crimson Sculpted Glass-Mosaic Gown Saree
products.body_html: A breathtaking intersection of sharp structural tailoring and fluid drapery, this crimson red pre-pleated concept saree is designed for the ultimate red-carpet statement. The ensemble masterfully balances a high-shine, avant-garde bodice with a soft, romantic trail, making it a spectacular choice for modern brides, luxury receptions, and high-glamour cocktail evenings.

products.title: Mauve Radiance Pre-Draped Sequins Saree Set
products.body_html:
Effortless glamour engineered for the modern wardrobe. This stunning mauve-pink cocktail saree eliminates the complexity of traditional draping without losing an ounce of elegance. Crafted from a lightweight, fluid georgette fabric, the saree is entirely pre-stitched with structured, red-carpet-ready pleats that trail into a sweeping, floor-length silhouette.

The fabric features a breathtaking cascade of tonal and silver micro-sequins arranged in a shimmering, organic pattern that catches the light beautifully with every movement. It pairs flawlessly with a heavily embellished V-neck sleeveless blouse, intricately detailed with glass beads, silver crystal elements, and a delicate bead-fringe finish along the hem. A perfect blend of traditional allure and contemporary convenience.

products.title: The Charcoal Silk Sharara Set with Antique Zardozi
products.body_html:
Draped in a striking metallic taupe-charcoal hue, this contemporary three-piece set is cut from premium, high-sheen raw silk that beautifully mimics the play of moonlight on water. The longline, structured tunic features a beautifully sculpted neckline and is adorned with intricate antique gold zardozi embroidery and delicate threadwork across the bodice, creating a rich tapestry of regal motifs.

The hemline of the tunic is playful yet sophisticated, finished with a cascading fringe of matching silk tassels. It pairs flawlessly with voluminous, wide-leg sharara pants that flow effortlessly with every step, punctuated by subtly scattered tassel drops. The look is completed by an ethereal, matching sheer dupatta worn elegantly as a choker-style wrap, adorned with a bold tassel trim that frames the face with pure exotic allure.

products.title: The Sovereign Ivory Embellished Lehenga Set
products.body_html:
Crafted in a striking shades-of-ivory palette, this full-length lehenga features a dramatic, heavily structured panel skirt designed to elongate the silhouette and create a breathtaking swirl. Every inch is meticulously detailed with dense silver micro-embroidery, geometric pearl lines, and ornate botanical motifs that catch the light from every angle.

The look is anchored by a contemporary, plunging sweetheart-neck bralette blouse, dramatically finished with a fluid fringe of hand-strung pearls along the hemline. Paired with a delicate, sheer net dupatta that gracefully cascades over the shoulder, this ensemble balances bold, modern lines with opulent Indian heritage craftsmanship.

products.title: An elegant champagne-beige embroidered kurta set
products.body_html: Exude understated luxury with this sophisticated champagne-beige traditional ensemble, designed with timeless elegance and intricate craftsmanship. The straight-cut kurta is beautifully adorned with fine embroidery across the neckline, sleeves, and hem, featuring delicate floral vines and majestic peacock motifs that add an artistic charm to the outfit. Crafted in a soft shimmering fabric, the ensemble radiates subtle glamour while maintaining a graceful silhouette. Paired with embroidered straight pants and a matching dupatta finished with detailed borders, this outfit creates a polished and regal appearance. Perfect for festive celebrations, intimate weddings, formal gatherings, and evening occasions, this ensemble blends classic

products.title: The Magenta Pink Luxurious Sharara Set
products.body_html: Make a striking statement with this exquisite fuchsia and teal traditional outfit, crafted to embody elegance and grandeur. The vibrant fuchsia kurta is beautifully embellished with intricate gold embroidery inspired by classic Mughal artistry, featuring ornate motifs across the neckline, sleeves, and hemline. Paired with a heavily embroidered teal sharara adorned with detailed zari work and rich borders, the ensemble creates a perfect balance of bold color and timeless sophistication. The matching dupatta, enhanced with elaborate embroidered borders and delicate detailing, adds a graceful finishing touch. Styled with traditional jewelry, this outfit is ideal for weddings, festive celebrations, receptions, and special cultural occasions where elegance takes center stage.

products.title: Elegant ivory ethnic flowy Anarkali Set.
products.body_html: Grace meets timeless elegance in this stunning ivory Anarkali outfit, beautifully adorned with delicate silver-gold embroidery throughout the silhouette. Crafted with a soft, flowy fabric, the ensemble features a flattering V-neckline, full sleeves with embroidered cuffs, and detailed vertical embellishments that create a graceful elongated look. The intricately embroidered hem adds richness and sophistication, while the matching sheer dupatta with scalloped embroidered borders enhances the regal appeal.

products.title: Zarina pearl drape saree
products.body_html: A refined ready-to-wear saree with a classic drape and elegant border, paired with a structured corset blouse featuring delicate one-inch shoulder straps. The corset is beautifully hand embroidered with pearls, kardana, sequins, and silver stones, adding a touch of shimmer to the timeless silhouette.

products.title: Celeste cape gown
products.body_html: An ethereal gown with extended sleeves that flow into a dramatic cape reaching the floor, creating graceful movement and elegance. The fitted blouse torso transitions into a voluminous waterfall flare with delicate cutwork, adorned with intricate hand embroidery of pearls, kardana, sequins, and silver stones for a luminous couture finish.

products.title: Sarah Drape Saree
products.body_html: A contemporary dark mocha brown drape saree featuring a high–low princess line belt detail, paired with a halter-neck corset blouse with delicate bicep tie strings. The saree flows into a flared drape with linear textures, finished with an embroidered cowl and extended pallu that cascades to the floor, creating a bold yet elegant silhouette.

products.title: Zaria Sharara Set
products.body_html: A chic sharara set featuring a sleeveless short kurti with delicate 1-inch shoulders, fully hand-embroidered with gold kardana, sequins, golden crystals, and silver crystals. The kurti is detailed with side tassels and criss-cross drawstrings, paired with a two-layered kali sharara with line embroidery and finished with an elegant dupatta, creating a refined festive look.

products.title: Luminara Drape saree
products.body_html: An elegant off-white draped saree paired with a sheer corset blouse that features a transparent panel at the waist. The corset is adorned with delicate hand embroidery of pearls, metal elements, crystals, and silver stones, while the saree is finished with a refined embroidered border along the edges, creating a timeless and sophisticated look

products.title: Moon veil Drape Saree
products.body_html: A statement draped saree with voluminous pleats supported by can-can, paired with a ruched organza corset blouse. The look features a hand-embroidered hip cowl that extends into a dramatic floor-length pallu with soft ruffles, adorned with intricate pearls, crystals, kardana, and silver stones, creating an elegant couture silhouette

products.title: Eloise Drape Saree
products.body_html: A contemporary mocha brown jade saree designed with structured pleats and subtle can-can for added volume, paired with a bustier corset blouse. A sculpted drape flows from the left shoulder to the right and falls into a graceful pallu, adorned with delicate hand embroidery of pearls, crystal-cut diamonds, and sequins, creating a refined couture statement.

products.title: Luna pearl co-ord set
products.body_html: A contemporary ensemble featuring palladium kali pants paired with a sleek tube blouse, layered with a statement hand-woven pearl and crystal jacket. The jacket is intricately crafted without any fabric base, forming a delicate lattice with tassel details in every box of the sleeves, creating a striking couture statement.

products.title: Noor Drape Sharara set
products.body_html: A contemporary front drape short kurta paired with a flowing Kali sharara, adorned with delicate hand embroidery of pearls, crystals, and stones on the front and back panels. The soft drape and intricate embellishments create a graceful yet statement festive look.

products.title: Silver whisper co-ord set
products.body_html: A sleek halter neck blouse paired with a straight fitted skirt featuring a subtle back slit for graceful movement. The ensemble is adorned with delicate hand embroidery using crystals, silver stones, and pearls, creating a refined shimmer that makes it perfect for elegant evening occasions.

products.title: Crysty co-ord set
products.body_html: A statement pearl and stone embroidered jacket paired with a sleek tube blouse and a flowing Kali sharara. The sharara features delicate bootie embroidery near the hem, adding subtle detail and elegance, while the jacket is finished with hanging pearl accents that bring movement and a touch of glamour to the ensemble.

products.title: Celeste Drape skirt co-ord set
products.body_html: A fluid palladium drape skirt paired with a sleek tube blouse and a delicate pearl-woven jacket, creating a modern yet elegant silhouette. The look is highlighted by a crystal and pearl embroidered waist belt that adds subtle shimmer and beautifully defines the drape, making it perfect for refined evening or festive occasions.

products.title: Moonlit Ivory Co-ord set
products.body_html: An elegant off-white corset and skirt co-ord set featuring a structured satin corset paired with a soft organza drape skirt. The look is cinched with a delicately hand-embroidered corset belt, adding a refined couture finish. Embellished with katdana, pearls, sequins, and silver stones, the ensemble carries a subtle shimmer and timeless sophistication.

products.title: Plum Hand Embroidered Lehenga
products.body_html: This Lehenga Set Is A Stunning Blend Of Grace And Grandeur, Perfect For Weddings And Festive Occasions. The Heavily Embroidered Blouse With Intricate Zari And Sequin Work Pairs Beautifully With The Voluminous Flared Lehenga, Richly Adorned With Ornate Motifs And A Heavily Embellished Border. A Sheer Dupatta With Delicate Butti Work And A Border Adds A Soft, Elegant Finish To The Look.

products.title: Hot Pink Contrast Sharara Set
products.body_html: Featuring heavily embroidered with mirror work, hot pink sharara set with bright contrast yellow dupatta perfect for religious ceremony, Festivals and wedding functions.

products.title: Sage Green Suit Set
products.body_html: Elevate Your Ethnic Wardrobe With This Stunning Sage Green Suit Set Crafted From Luxurious Shimmer Silk Fabric. The Soft, Luminous Texture Of The Silk Adds A Graceful Sheen, Making It Perfect For Festive Occasions And Celebrations. The Set Includes A Beautifully Tailored Kurta, Matching Bottoms, And A Coordinated Dupatta That Completes The Look With Elegance. The Subtle Shimmer Enhances The Pastel Tone, Creating A Perfect Balance Of Sophistication And Charm.

products.title: Red Embroidered Anarkali Set
products.body_html:
Step into timeless elegance with this stunning red Anarkali set designed to make every festive moment memorable. Crafted in a rich red fabric adorned with delicate gold motifs, the outfit features a gracefully flared silhouette that offers both comfort and sophistication.

The ensemble is paired with a beautifully embroidered net dupatta featuring intricate lattice work and a detailed gold border that adds a touch of regal charm. The coordinated bottom with embellished hem detailing completes the look with refined elegance.

products.title: Beige Glow Lehenga Set
products.body_html: A radiant beige-toned lehenga set featuring a delicately embellished blouse paired with a voluminous skirt adorned with intricate sequin and thread work. The ensemble is complemented by a sheer, embroidered dupatta that adds softness and graceful movement. Perfect for weddings, receptions, and festive celebrations, this look exudes understated glamour with a timeless, elegant appeal.

products.title: Sand Bloom Sharara Set
products.body_html: A beautifully crafted beige sharara set adorned with intricate multicolored floral embroidery that adds a vibrant yet elegant touch. The straight-cut kurta is richly detailed with delicate embellishments, paired with flowy sharara pants that create a graceful silhouette. Finished with a soft sheer dupatta featuring fine borders and scattered floral accents, this ensemble is perfect for festive occasions, weddings, and daytime celebrations, blending subtle tones with lively detailing.

products.title: Ivory Contrast Anarkali Set
products.body_html: A graceful ivory Anarkali set adorned with delicate embroidery, paired with a vibrant rose-pink dupatta featuring intricate borders. The flowing silhouette of the Anarkali adds elegance and movement, while the rich contrast of the dupatta enhances its festive appeal. Perfect for weddings, celebrations, and special occasions, this ensemble blends subtle sophistication with traditional charm.

products.title: The Patchouli Palace Lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Patchouli Palace Lehenga

Created with mirror inspired artwork with flamingos and sheesh mahal panels the lehenga brings together colours of flamingos in the grand tulle veil and a canvas in rambagh silk dyed in sky colour. Featuring kachi dori, zardozi, crystals and mini mirrors.

products.title: The Silent Garden Tulle Japanese pink lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Silent Garden Japanese Pink Lehenga

An ode to love in nature the lehenga is inspired by serene meadows with cherry blossoms, butterflies and pixies. Like a midsummers eve the lehenga dreams over a Japanese Pink tulle canvas.

Introducing a new language in resham aari that subtly sits on the colour of the tulle, adorned with fine zardozi & finished with crystal work. The lehenga is a light weight translation of Matsya’s signature couture craft made to dance, and be easy on the wedding day.

products.title: The Savannah Tulle Snow Lehenga
products.body_html:
The Savannah Tulle Snow lehenga

The African Savannah’s & Masai Mara have been a permanent inspiration for us. This lehenga focusses on the cheetah & the exotic nature of the lush grasslands. The cheetah’s power & agility makes its spotting even exotic & its presence in the African fauna sparks a sense of adventure & mystery that is true to marriage itself.

Introducing a new language in resham aari that subtly sits on the colour of the tulle, adorned with fine zardozi & finished with crystal work. The lehenga is a light weight translation of Matsya’s signature couture craft made to dance, and be easy on the wedding day.
Paired with an optional Royal Parsi Veil created with Parisian Chantley and a Parsi embroidered Shadow.

products.title: The Amanbagh Lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Amanbagh Lehenga

A landscape of blending the Tuscan villas & florentine landscape with Jaipuri colours in resham ari. A serene contradiction that creates an amalgamation of pinks, greens and peaches with gold over Rambagh silk in resham aari, kachi dori & resham ari finished with zardozi. Cypress trees feature on the lehenga, blouse & veil. Needle cut pearl cut through the hem of the lehenga.

products.title: The Vintage Royal Maze lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Vintage Royal Maza Lehenga

Created with royal palatial inspiration the lehenga is created on silk tissue in Ekru crafted with kachi dori and vintage zardozi and pittan embroidery. The artwork is a geographical maze with elements of indian flora and fauna.
Paired with a tulle veil with a grand top flowing down with crystals and the Matsya wings across an intricate pittan pattern on the border.

products.title: The Wild Seascape French Rose lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Wild Seascape French Rose Lehenga

Created with artwork that comes from a Matsya inspired art project with exotic wild ocean flora finished with a border that has the Matsya fishes themselves & translated with Kachi Dori and evolved modern zardozi with crystals. The blouse has a signature matsya winged hem & the lehenga features our iconic V-winged belt. The canvas is our iconic French Rose Silk Velvet with a Veil in Tulle bordered with opulent tarnished silver Zardozi.

products.title: The Vintage Matsya Palace Ekru Lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Vintage Matsya Palace Ekru Lehenga Created

The palace artwork is inspired by a series of windows layered over each other peeping with heritage and matsya signature elements. Crafted in vintage gold kachi dori and zardozi finished with antique crystals and a royal layered border. The canvas is silk velvet dipped in Aged Ekru paired with a tulle veil & dupatta with a heavy border. The lehenga is a symbol of heritage & royalty featuring the Matsya V wing and a Nawabi cut blouse.

products.title: The Vintage Tuscan Heritage Lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Vinatage Tuscan Heritage Lehenga

Built with our signature opulent zardozi & kachi dori the lehenga is made to recreate a lush Tuscan landscape with vintage homes & flora representing a life of exploration, love & serenity. Featuring cypress trees, Tuscan palms & heritage villas in antique kachi dori. Finished with our iconic V-wing belt and a delicate needle cut border across the tulle veil & lehenga hem in vintage Zardozi. Paired with an optional Palace Veil with a Chantley trail speaking Modern Royalty.

products.title: The Nizami Maze Lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Nizami Maza Lehenga

Created with royal palatial inspirations and colours the lehenga feathers tulle appliqués on our signature rambagh silk crafted with kachi dori and vintage zardozi. The artwork is a geographical maze with elements of indian flora and fauna.
Paired with an aged rose tulle veil with a grand top flowing down with crystals and the Matsya wings across an intricate appliqué pattern on the border.

products.title: The Tuscan heritage landscape lehenga
products.body_html:
Unveiling
The Tuscan Heritage Lehenga

Built with our signature opulent zardozi & kachi dori the lehenga is made to recreate a lush Tuscan landscape with vintage homes & flora representing a life of exploration, love & serenity. The cypress trees are created with mini mirrors and the Tuscan palms are done with kachi dori. Finished with our iconic V-wing belt and a delicate needle cut border across the tulle veil & lehenga hem edged with pearls. The silk tissue on the sage canvas inspires calm & peace that wish over the union.

products.title: Peach Kurta Set
products.body_html: A soft and elegant peach kurta set designed for effortless grace. Featuring a beautifully tailored kurta paired with complementing bottoms, this ensemble offers a refined and comfortable silhouette. The soothing hue and subtle detailing make it perfect for daytime festivities, casual celebrations, and intimate gatherings.

products.title: Regal Embroidered Sharara Set
products.body_html:
Stunning traditional elegance featuring a teal, wine and orange embroidered sharara set, designed for festive and wedding occasions. Both ensembles showcase intricate gold embroidery with classic motifs, paired with straight-cut kurtas and beautifully pleated shararas that create a rich, flowing silhouette.
The mehendi green set brings a fresh, daytime festive charm, while the rust orange adds warmth and depth, perfect for evening celebrations. Each look is completed with a lightweight dupatta adorned with delicate zari borders, adding grace and movement.

products.title: Embroidered Sharara Set
products.body_html:
A stunning duo of traditional elegance featuring a mehendi green and rust orange embroidered sharara set, designed for festive and wedding occasions. Both ensembles showcase intricate gold embroidery with classic motifs, paired with straight-cut kurtas and beautifully pleated shararas that create a rich, flowing silhouette.
The mehendi green set brings a fresh, daytime festive charm, while the rust orange adds warmth and depth, perfect for evening celebrations. Each look is completed with a lightweight dupatta adorned with delicate zari borders, adding grace and movement.

products.title: Black Sharara set
products.body_html: A timeless black sharara set designed for effortless sophistication. Featuring a beautifully tailored kurta paired with flared sharara pants, this ensemble creates a graceful and flattering silhouette. Subtle detailing enhances its charm, making it a versatile choice for festive occasions, evening gatherings, and celebrations with a touch of understated glamour.

products.title: PInk Sharara Set
products.body_html: An elegant ice blue sharara set crafted in lustrous silk, featuring delicate gold embroidery in vertical patterns. The sleeveless kurta comes with fine lace detailing along the neckline and hem, paired with flowy wide-leg sharara pants that create a graceful silhouette. Finished with a soft, sheer dupatta, this outfit is perfect for festive occasions, weddings, or evening celebrations.

products.title: Red Sequins Sharara Set
products.body_html: A striking red sharara set adorned with shimmering sequin detailing that catches the light beautifully. Featuring a flattering kurta paired with flared sharara pants, this ensemble creates a bold yet elegant silhouette. Perfect for festive celebrations, weddings, and evening events, it brings together glamour and traditional charm effortlessly.
